---
title: "Data sources and Citations"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
bibliography: references.bib
csl: nature.csl
link-citations: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data sources and Citations}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(site)
```

# `r un_badge()`

### UNWPP @UNWPP
**Dataset:** Historical population estimates  
**Dataset name:** WPP2022_Population1JanuaryBySingleAgeSex_Medium_1950-2021  
**Accessed via:** Webpage  
**Last accessed:** 30/08/2023

**Dataset:** Future population projections  
**Dataset name:** WPP2022_Population1JanuaryBySingleAgeSex_Medium_2022-2100  
**Accessed via:** Webpage  
**Last accessed:** 30/08/2023

### UNWUP @UNWUP
**Dataset:** Urban population estimates  
**Dataset name:** WUP2018-F02-Proportion_Urban  
**Accessed via:** Webpage  
**Last accessed:** 30/08/2023

---

# `r worldpop_badge()`

### Population spatial distribution @WorldPop2025
**Dataset** Individual countries 2015-2030 ( 1km resolution ) R2025A v1  
**Dataset name:** G2_CN_POP_R25A_1km  
**Accessed via:** API  
**Last accessed:** 06/01/2026

---

# `r map_badge()`

### Prevalence estimates @MAP_package
**Dataset** Plasmodium falciparum prevalence in 2 to 10 year olds  
**Dataset name:** Malaria__202508_Global_Pf_Parasite_Rate_  
**Accessed via:** R-package  
**Last accessed:** 06/01/2026

**Dataset** Plasmodium vivax prevalence in 0 to 100 year olds  
**Dataset name:** Malaria__202508_Global_Pv_Parasite_Rate  
**Accessed via:** R-package  
**Last accessed:** 06/01/2026

### Intervention coverage estimates @MAP_package

# Citations
